name_cn:
Genuine quality
EEN LOLA Glossy Calfskin Handbag
8 X 5 X 2 inches (20 X 11.5 X 5 cm)
Calfskin
Sheepskin lining
Handle, shoulder, and crossbody
TRIOMPHE turnlock closure
1 interior compartment
1 interior flat pocket
Leather handle length 3 inches (7 cm)
Removable and adjustable shoulder strap, minimum length 19 inches (47.5 cm), maximum length 22.5 inches (57 cm)
Style No.: 119533BF4.38NO
